advisories.description: Supply chain attack by North Korean group UNC1069. Malicious dependency delivers cross-platform RAT. Both 1.x and 0.x branches poisoned within 39 minutes.
advisories.action: BLOCK install. Use axios@1.13.5 or earlier. Do NOT use caret ranges (^1.14.0 or ^0.30.0).

advisories.description: Supply chain compromise — UNC6426 used stolen keys to breach AWS environments within 72 hours.
advisories.action: BLOCK install. Verify nx version is not in compromised list.

advisories.description: Shai-Hulud worm campaign. Steals cloud service tokens, deploys secret-scanning tools, spreads to additional accounts.
advisories.action: BLOCK install. Use chalk@5.4.1 or earlier verified version.

advisories.description: Shai-Hulud worm campaign. Part of the same attack that hit chalk and 500+ other packages.
advisories.action: BLOCK install. Use debug@4.4.0 or earlier verified version.

notes: This registry is checked by the Claude Code package-install hook before any npm/yarn/pnpm install. Add new entries as advisories are published. Managed via APS record #39 (npm-supply-chain).
